meaning: A ballot that allows a voter to vote by mail or electronically if they cannot go to a polling station on election day.
definition: A ballot that allows a voter to vote by mail or electronically if they cannot go to a polling station on election day.
example: Since he was studying abroad, he had to request an absentee ballot to vote in his home country's election.
exampleHindi: चूँकि वह विदेश में पढ़ रहे थे, इसलिए उन्हें अपने देश के चुनाव में मतदान करने के लिए अनुपस्थित मतपत्र का अनुरोध करना पड़ा।

meaning: A sheet of paper or electronic screen used to cast a vote in an election.
definition: A sheet of paper or electronic screen used to cast a vote in an election.
example: She marked her choices on the paper ballot and slipped it into the box.
exampleHindi: उसने मतपत्र पर अपनी पसंद अंकित की और उसे बॉक्स में डाल दिया।

meaning: A locked box where voters place their completed voting papers.
definition: A locked box where voters place their completed voting papers.
example: At the end of the day, the ballot boxes were collected and taken to a secure location for counting.
exampleHindi: दिन के अंत में, मतपेटियों को एकत्र किया गया और गिनती के लिए सुरक्षित स्थान पर ले जाया गया।

meaning: A proposed law or amendment that is placed on a ballot for voters to approve or reject.
definition: A proposed law or amendment that is placed on a ballot for voters to approve or reject.
example: Voters approved the ballot measure to fund public parks through a small sales tax increase.
exampleHindi: मतदाताओं ने एक छोटी बिक्री कर वृद्धि के माध्यम से सार्वजनिक पार्कों को वित्त पोषित करने के लिए मतपत्र उपाय को मंजूरी दे दी।

meaning: A planned series of activities, like rallies and advertisements, to help a candidate win an election.
example: The mayor launched his campaign with a speech promising to lower taxes and improve schools.
exampleHindi: मेयर ने अपने अभियान की शुरुआत एक भाषण के साथ की जिसमें करों को कम करने और स्कूलों में सुधार करने का वादा किया गया।

meaning: A person who competes in an election to win a political office.
definition: A person who competes in an election to win a political office.
example: The candidates participated in a debate to explain their plans for the city's economy.
exampleHindi: उम्मीदवारों ने शहर की अर्थव्यवस्था के लिए अपनी योजनाओं को समझाने के लिए एक बहस में भाग लिया।

meaning: A meeting of members of a political party to choose candidates, discuss policies, or make decisions.
definition: A meeting of members of a political party to choose candidates, discuss policies, or make decisions.
example: Voters gathered at the local school for the party caucus to select their preferred candidate.
exampleHindi: मतदाता अपने पसंदीदा उम्मीदवार का चयन करने के लिए पार्टी कॉकस के लिए स्थानीय स्कूल में एकत्र हुए।

meaning: An electoral district or area represented by a specific elected official.
definition: An electoral district or area represented by a specific elected official.
example: The representative promised to build a new hospital in her constituency if she was re-elected.
exampleHindi: प्रतिनिधि ने दोबारा निर्वाचित होने पर अपने निर्वाचन क्षेत्र में एक नया अस्पताल बनाने का वादा किया।

meaning: The act of taking away a person's or group's right to vote.
definition: The act of taking away a person's or group's right to vote.
example: The new voting laws were criticized as a form of disfranchisement aimed at low-income communities.
exampleHindi: नए मतदान कानूनों की कम आय वाले समुदायों के लिए मताधिकार के हनन के रूप में आलोचना की गई।

meaning: Actively working to help a political party or candidate win an election, especially close to or on election day.
definition: Actively working to help a political party or candidate win an election, especially close to or on election day.
example: The law bans any electioneering, such as holding campaign signs, within 100 feet of a polling place.
exampleHindi: कानून किसी भी चुनाव प्रचार पर प्रतिबंध लगाता है, जैसे कि मतदान स्थल के 100 फीट के भीतर अभियान चिन्ह रखना।

meaning: An independent organization that manages and monitors elections to make sure they are fair.
definition: An independent organization that manages and monitors elections to make sure they are fair.
example: The elections commission investigated reports of voting machine errors in several districts.
exampleHindi: चुनाव आयोग ने कई जिलों में वोटिंग मशीनों में गड़बड़ी की रिपोर्ट की जांच की।

meaning: A group of electors chosen by voters to formally elect the president and vice president in some countries.
definition: A group of electors chosen by voters to formally elect the president and vice president in some countries.
example: Although he won the popular vote, he failed to secure enough votes in the Electoral College to become president.
exampleHindi: हालाँकि उन्होंने लोकप्रिय वोट जीता, लेकिन वे राष्ट्रपति बनने के लिए इलेक्टोरल कॉलेज में पर्याप्त वोट हासिल करने में असफल रहे।

meaning: The official list of people who are registered and allowed to vote in a district.
definition: The official list of people who are registered and allowed to vote in a district.
example: Before you can vote, you must make sure your name is registered on the electoral roll.
exampleHindi: मतदान करने से पहले, आपको यह सुनिश्चित करना होगा कि आपका नाम मतदाता सूची में पंजीकृत है।

meaning: All of the people in a country or region who are registered and eligible to vote in an election.
definition: All of the people in a country or region who are registered and eligible to vote in an election.
example: The candidate spent months traveling the country to win the support of the electorate.
exampleHindi: मतदाताओं का समर्थन जीतने के लिए उम्मीदवार ने महीनों तक देश भर में यात्रा की।

meaning: A survey of voters taken immediately after they leave the polling station, used to predict the winner before official results are ready.
definition: A survey of voters taken immediately after they leave the polling station, used to predict the winner before official results are ready.
example: The exit polls suggest a close race, but we must wait for the official vote count.
exampleHindi: एग्ज़िट पोल में कांटे की टक्कर का अनुमान है, लेकिन हमें आधिकारिक वोटों की गिनती का इंतज़ार करना चाहिए।

meaning: A regular election in which voters choose candidates for national or state political offices.
definition: A regular election in which voters choose candidates for national or state political offices.
example: Citizens will vote for the next president and members of parliament in the general election.
exampleHindi: आम चुनाव में नागरिक अगले राष्ट्रपति और संसद सदस्यों के लिए मतदान करेंगे।

meaning: Redrawing the boundaries of voting districts in an unfair way to give one political party an advantage.
definition: Redrawing the boundaries of voting districts in an unfair way to give one political party an advantage.
example: The ruling party was accused of gerrymandering to protect its seats in the upcoming election.
exampleHindi: सत्तारूढ़ दल पर आगामी चुनाव में अपनी सीटों की रक्षा के लिए हेराफेरी करने का आरोप लगाया गया था।

meaning: The person who currently holds a political office.
definition: Necessary as a duty or responsibility; the current holder of a role (strong alternative to 'required' or 'current').
example: It is often difficult for a challenger to defeat an incumbent who has been in office for many years.
exampleHindi: किसी चुनौती देने वाले के लिए कई वर्षों से पद पर बैठे किसी पदाधिकारी को हराना अक्सर मुश्किल होता है।

meaning: An overwhelming victory in an election where one candidate or party wins by a massive margin.
example: The governor won re-election in a landslide, winning over 75% of the total votes.
exampleHindi: गवर्नर ने भारी बहुमत से पुनः चुनाव जीता और कुल वोटों में से 75% से अधिक वोट प्राप्त किये।

meaning: The act of officially proposing someone as a candidate for an election or office.
definition: The act of officially proposing someone as a candidate for an election or office.
example: The party delegates cheered when the candidate officially accepted the nomination for president.
exampleHindi: जब उम्मीदवार ने आधिकारिक तौर पर राष्ट्रपति पद के लिए नामांकन स्वीकार कर लिया तो पार्टी प्रतिनिधियों ने खुशी जताई।

meaning: A formal statement of the core goals, beliefs, and policies of a political party or candidate.
definition: à¤®à¤‚à¤š / à¤ªà¥à¤²à¥‡à¤Ÿà¤«à¥‰à¤°à¥à¤®
example: The candidate's platform focuses heavily on education reform and renewable energy.
exampleHindi: उम्मीदवार का मंच शिक्षा सुधार और नवीकरणीय ऊर्जा पर बहुत अधिक केंद्रित है।

meaning: Winning the most votes in an election, even if it is not a clear majority (more than 50%).
definition: Winning the most votes in an election, even if it is not a clear majority (more than 50%).
example: Because there were four candidates, the winner won by a plurality of 40% of the total votes.
exampleHindi: चूँकि वहाँ चार उम्मीदवार थे, विजेता कुल मतों के 40% से अधिक मतों से जीता।

meaning: The total number of individual votes cast by citizens in an election, rather than the votes of electors.
definition: The total number of individual votes cast by citizens in an election, rather than the votes of electors.
example: She won the popular vote nationwide, but her opponent won the election through the electoral college.
exampleHindi: उन्होंने देश भर में लोकप्रिय वोट जीता, लेकिन उनके प्रतिद्वंद्वी ने निर्वाचक मंडल के माध्यम से चुनाव जीता।

meaning: An election held to choose a political party's candidate for the main election.
definition: An election held to choose a political party's candidate for the main election.
example: She won the primary election and will now represent her party in the general election in November.
exampleHindi: उन्होंने प्राथमिक चुनाव जीता और अब नवंबर में आम चुनाव में अपनी पार्टी का प्रतिनिधित्व करेंगी।

meaning: A direct vote by the citizens of a country on a specific question or law.
definition: A direct vote by the citizens of a country on a specific question or law.
example: The citizens voted in a referendum to decide whether the country should adopt a new constitution.
exampleHindi: नागरिकों ने जनमत संग्रह में यह निर्णय लेने के लिए मतदान किया कि देश को नया संविधान अपनाना चाहिए या नहीं।

meaning: A second election held when no candidate wins the required majority in the first election.
definition: A second election held when no candidate wins the required majority in the first election.
example: Since neither candidate got over 50% of the votes, they will face each other in a runoff election next month.
exampleHindi: चूँकि किसी भी उम्मीदवार को 50% से अधिक वोट नहीं मिले, वे अगले महीने होने वाले आम चुनाव में एक-दूसरे का सामना करेंगे।

meaning: The practice of a winning political party giving government jobs to its supporters as a reward.
definition: The practice of a winning political party giving government jobs to its supporters as a reward.
example: The spoils system was replaced by a civil service exam to ensure government jobs were given based on merit.
exampleHindi: यह सुनिश्चित करने के लिए कि सरकारी नौकरियाँ योग्यता के आधार पर दी जाएँ, लूट प्रणाली को सिविल सेवा परीक्षा से बदल दिया गया।

meaning: An unofficial vote taken to see what people think about a candidate or issue before a real election.
definition: An unofficial vote taken to see what people think about a candidate or issue before a real election.
example: The party conducted a straw poll at the convention to see which candidate was most popular.
exampleHindi: पार्टी ने यह देखने के लिए सम्मेलन में एक स्ट्रॉ पोल आयोजित किया कि कौन सा उम्मीदवार सबसे लोकप्रिय है।

meaning: The legal right to vote in political elections.
definition: The legal right to vote in political elections.
example: In the early 20th century, women marched in the streets to fight for suffrage.
exampleHindi: 20वीं सदी की शुरुआत में, महिलाओं ने मताधिकार के लिए लड़ने के लिए सड़कों पर मार्च किया।

meaning: A majority that is much larger than a simple majority, such as two-thirds (2/3) or three-fifths (3/5), required to pass certain laws.
definition: A majority that is much larger than a simple majority, such as two-thirds (2/3) or three-fifths (3/5), required to pass certain laws.
example: The senate needs a supermajority of two-thirds to override the president's veto.
exampleHindi: राष्ट्रपति के वीटो को रद्द करने के लिए सीनेट को दो-तिहाई बहुमत की आवश्यकता है।

meaning: A state where support for different political parties is very similar, so the election outcome is hard to predict.
definition: A state where support for different political parties is very similar, so the election outcome is hard to predict.
example: Both candidates spent a lot of time and money campaigning in the swing state, hoping to win its electoral votes.
exampleHindi: दोनों उम्मीदवारों ने चुनावी वोट जीतने की उम्मीद में इस महत्वपूर्ण राज्य में प्रचार करने में बहुत समय और पैसा खर्च किया।

meaning: A legal limit on the number of times a person can be elected to a specific public office.
definition: A legal limit on the number of times a person can be elected to a specific public office.
example: The president cannot run for office again because of the country's two-term limit.
exampleHindi: देश की दो कार्यकाल की सीमा के कारण राष्ट्रपति दोबारा पद के लिए चुनाव नहीं लड़ सकता।

meaning: The percentage of eligible voters who actually participate and vote in an election.
definition: The percentage of eligible voters who actually participate and vote in an election.
example: High voter turnout is a sign of strong public interest and active civic engagement.
exampleHindi: उच्च मतदान प्रतिशत मजबूत सार्वजनिक हित और सक्रिय नागरिक भागीदारी का संकेत है।

meaning: A candidate whose name is not printed on the ballot but whose name voters can write in to vote for them.
definition: A candidate whose name is not printed on the ballot but whose name voters can write in to vote for them.
example: Although she was not on the official ballot, she ran as a write-in candidate and received thousands of votes.
exampleHindi: हालाँकि वह आधिकारिक मतपत्र पर नहीं थीं, फिर भी वह लिखित उम्मीदवार के रूप में दौड़ीं और उन्हें हजारों वोट मिले।
